entries.details: Regression test AC-058: all 50 original acceptance checks pass against the new open-source layout.

checks.npm_install_build: passed - npm install && npm run build exits 0, produces dist/index.js + all modules
checks.tsc_noEmit: passed - npx tsc --noEmit exits 0, strict mode, NodeNext modules with .js extensions
checks.docker_build_uid: passed - docker build . --platform linux/amd64 succeeds, image runs as UID 10001 (relay user), EXPOSE 8080 informational
checks.relay_config_docker_yaml_is_thin_wrapper: passed - relay-config.docker.yaml differs only in docker-network hostnames from relay-config.example.yaml; same controlPlane + resources + masking + audit shape
checks.loadConfig_parses_without_code_changes: passed - loadConfig() parses both example and docker config files identically via interpolation + Zod schema
checks.pii_masking: passed - email/CPF masked in query results; maskedFieldCount:2 reported correctly
checks.audit_logger: passed - structured JSON audit entries written for success (info), denial (warn), and masking events
checks.policy_engine: passed - unknown resource denied with -32600 + reason; row limit enforcement operational
checks.postgres_driver: passed - SELECT 1 returns row; list_tables returns orders table; health_check reports order-pg healthy: true
checks.mongo_driver: passed - order-mongo reports healthy: true in health_check
checks.websocket_transport: passed - relay connects to control-plane stub, sends resource_update on open, heartbeats every 30s; reconnects on non-intentional close
checks.json_rpc_dispatch: passed - execute, list_resources, describe_resource, health_check all return correct results; unknown_method returns -32601
checks.graceful_shutdown: passed - SIGTERM triggers 'Shutting down...' log, exit code 0; second SIGTERM has no effect
checks.no_vendor_dependencies: passed - package.json and source tree have zero references to aws-sdk, stripe, @clerk/*, @sentry/*, @langfuse/*, @svix/*, @slack/*, composio-*, @mastra/*
checks.docker_compose_stack: passed - four services (stub, postgres, mongo, relay) all Up; relay connected to control plane; resource_update sent with 2 resources
